title: T-040 — Barcode lookup endpoints (LP / location / validate) (WH §13.2)
prompt:
# T-040 — Barcode lookup endpoints (LP / location / validate) (WH §13.2)

PRD: docs/prd/05-WAREHOUSE-PRD.md §13.2
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement 3 scanner endpoints: lookup LP by barcode, lookup location by barcode, validate-any-barcode. Auto-detects LP_number vs GS1-128 vs SSCC. <200 ms P95.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/lookup/lp/[barcode]/route.ts` — accepts plain LP number OR GS1-128 (uses T-023 parser to extract AI(01)/(10)/(21) and resolve LP).
2. `apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/lookup/location/[barcode]/route.ts` — accepts QR or Code128 location codes.
3. `apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/validate-barcode/route.ts` (POST) — returns `{type: 'lp'|'location'|'gs1-128'|'sscc'|'unknown', decoded: {...}}`.
4. All three behind scanner session auth.

## Files
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/lookup/lp/[barcode]/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/lookup/location/[barcode]/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/validate-barcode/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/warehouse/scanner/lookup/__tests__/lookup.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given LP number 'LP00000001', when GET /lookup/lp/LP00000001, then the LP record returned.
2. Given a GS1-128 barcode encoding GTIN+lot, when sent to /lookup/lp, then it parses via T-023 and resolves LP via batch+gtin or returns 404 with parsed ais.
3. Given a malformed barcode, when POST /validate-barcode, then `type='unknown'` with `errors[]`.

## Test strategy
- RED: `apps/web/lib/services/warehouse/__tests__/scanner-lookup.test.ts` asserting LP/loc/validate paths + GS1 parse integration.
- Run `pnpm --filter web test scanner-lookup`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip session auth on any of the 3 endpoints.
- Do not return 500 on parse error — return structured `type:'unknown'`.

## Dependencies
- T-023
- T-002
- T-012
